name: sutra
description: Sutra — Operating system for building with AI. Input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace. Opinionated governance for Claude Code sessions.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Sutra Core — governance primitives: input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace + v2.0 privacy model (signals-not-content, consent-gated, local-first). Hooks warn when depth marker is missing before Edit/Write; estimation metrics are logged on session end. Includes session-retrieve for recovering abruptly-closed sessions. Privacy: see ~/.sutra/PRIVACY.md; opt out with SUTRA_TELEMETRY=0.
